description: Memory Priority and Lifecycle Management - NEVER DELETE POLICY

policy.note: Jakin's explicit requirement: I never automatically delete anything I have learned. Ever.

P0.name: Critical
P0.description: Active project decisions, current context, hot retrieval

P1.name: Important
P1.description: Key context, reference often, keep hot

P2.name: Background
P2.description: Useful context, keep accessible but lower priority retrieval

P3.name: Cold Storage
P3.description: Low priority, archive for completeness only

promote_on_access.description: Auto-promote P2→P1 if accessed 5+ times in 30 days (affects retrieval priority only)

demote_on_neglect.description: Auto-demote P1→P2 if not accessed for 90 days (affects retrieval priority only)

archive_to_cold_storage.description: Move P2/P3 to archive directory after 1 year (NEVER DELETE)
archive_to_cold_storage.note: Files are MOVED not DELETED. Full recovery possible.

priority_markers.usage: Add marker at start of memory entry (affects retrieval ranking only)
priority_markers.example: **[P1]** Power Platform CLI configuration for Code Apps

access_tracking.purpose: Improves retrieval ranking only - no deletion decisions

review_cadence.note: Reviews are for Jakin's manual curation only - I never auto-delete
